keyword_groups.label: Psychopharmakologie
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Psychopharmacology"[MeSH Terms] OR "psychopharmacology"[Title/Abstract] OR ("Antidepressive Agents"[MeSH Terms] AND pharmacology[Title/Abstract]) OR ("Antipsychotic Agents"[MeSH Terms] AND pharmacology[Title/Abstract]) OR "mood stabilizer"[Title/Abstract] OR "psychiatric drug"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: Neurobiologie der Psychiatrie
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Psychiatry"[MeSH Terms] OR "Mental Disorders"[MeSH Terms]) AND ("Neurobiology"[MeSH Terms] OR "Neuroimaging"[MeSH Terms] OR "Neuroinflammation"[MeSH Terms] OR "Brain"[MeSH Terms]) OR "psychiatric neurobiology"[Title/Abstract] OR "neuroimaging psychiatry"[Title/Abstract] OR "psychiatric genetics"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: klinische Psychiatrie und Diagnostik
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Psychiatry"[MeSH Terms] AND ("Diagnosis"[MeSH Terms] OR "Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders"[MeSH Terms] OR clinical[Title/Abstract]) OR "psychiatric diagnosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "DSM criteria"[Title/Abstract] OR "psychiatric assessment"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: Therapiestudien psychiatrisch
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Randomized Controlled Trial"[Publication Type] OR "Clinical Trial"[Publication Type]) AND ("Mental Disorders"[MeSH Terms] OR "Psychiatry"[MeSH Terms] OR psychiatry[Title/Abstract]) OR "psychotherapy efficacy"[Title/Abstract] OR "psychiatric treatment outcome"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: Schizophrenie und Psychose
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Schizophrenia"[MeSH Terms] OR "Psychotic Disorders"[MeSH Terms] OR "schizophrenia"[Title/Abstract] OR "psychosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "first-episode psychosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "schizophrenia spectrum"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: Depression und affektive Störungen
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Depressive Disorder, Major"[MeSH Terms] OR "Depressive Disorder, Treatment-Resistant"[MeSH Terms] OR "major depressive disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "treatment-resistant depression"[Title/Abstract] OR "antidepressant treatment"[Title/Abstract] OR "ketamine depression"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: Bipolare Störung
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Bipolar Disorder"[MeSH Terms] OR "bipolar disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "bipolar I disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "bipolar II disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "lithium treatment bipolar"[Title/Abstract] OR "mania clinical"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: Angststörungen
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Anxiety Disorders"[MeSH Terms] OR "anxiety disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "generalized anxiety disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "panic disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "social anxiety disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "anxiety pharmacotherapy"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: PTSD und Traumafolgestörungen
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Stress Disorders, Post-Traumatic"[MeSH Terms] OR "post-traumatic stress disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "PTSD treatment"[Title/Abstract] OR "EMDR"[Title/Abstract] OR "prolonged exposure PTSD"[Title/Abstract] OR "trauma therapy"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: Sucht und Substanzstörungen
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Substance-Related Disorders"[MeSH Terms] OR "Alcoholism"[MeSH Terms] OR "Opioid-Related Disorders"[MeSH Terms] OR "substance use disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "alcohol use disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "opioid use disorder"[Title/Abstract] OR "addiction psychiatry"[Title/Abstract]
